title: Patience: Or, Comforts In Crosses.
content:
Abundant plagues I late have had,
    Yet none of these have made me sad:
    For why? My Saviour with the sense
    Of suff'ring gives me patience.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Patience: Or, Comforts In Crosses.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
